positive: Minimalist celestial geometry illustration, depicting abstract constellations and nebulae interwoven with sharp, stylized geometric shapes. Dominant colors are deep indigo, royal blue, muted teal, and vibrant cosmic gold, providing high contrast against a slightly lighter background. The composition is centralized and symmetrical, emphasizing clean silhouettes and sharp edges, designed to look excellent when printed on fabric. The style should be a mix of Art Deco influence and modern scientific diagrammatic art, rendered with clean linework, depth, and a polished, graphic novel aesthetic. High detail, vector quality finish, perfect for large-scale apparel printing.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, low contrast, watermark, signature, text, logo, cartoon, childish, abstract chaos, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grain, dirty, stained, cropped, out of frame
